description: Preserve original cruncher top 6 and fill ranks 7-20 with progressive frequency numbers without duplicates.
inputs_required: historical prior draws available before target

algorithm.step_1: Take top 6 numbers from cruncher ranking.
algorithm.step_2: Compute progressive frequency ranking from eligible historical draws only.
algorithm.step_3: Append frequency-ranked numbers not already in top 6 until top 20 is filled.
algorithm.step_4: Do not modify official scores; output candidate ranking separately.

guardrails: No production use until holdout and future unseen validation pass.
